message:
test(workflows): add AuthRecoveryStrategy::from_detection tests

Add 6 tests for AuthRecoveryStrategy::from_detection covering all
three strategy branches:

- DeviceCode: from event_type and from rule_id containing "device_code"
- ApiKeyError: from auth.error event_type and from api_key rule_id
- ManualIntervention: fallback for unrecognized auth events,
  missing agent_type defaults to "unknown"

Total handler tests: 141 (was 135).

Build: CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/ft-tansummit-target --no-default-features
All 141 pass (0.02s).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
